differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with Granulomatous-Lymphocytic Interstitial Lung Disease (GLILD)
Chronic Granulomatous Disease (late-onset or partial deficiency)
next_steps: Measurement of serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM) and lymphocyte subsets by flow cytometry
16S/18S ribosomal RNA gene sequencing (PCR) on existing hepatic tissue to detect fastidious organisms
Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay for NADPH oxidase function to screen for CGD
Genetic testing for XIAP (BIRC4) and other immunodeficiency-related gene panels
Evaluation for Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) via soluble CD25 and ferritin levels
Re-evaluation of hepatic tissue by specialized hematopathologist for T-cell markers to rule out occult lymphoma
